stemHtml: To prevent empty field myopia at higher altitudes..

options.a: one should concentrate only on the instruments.
options.b: one should book an appointment with an ophthalmologist as soon as possible.
options.c: a pilot should use short, sharp scans, or periodically focus on a distant object such as a wingtip or cloud edge.
options.d: it is recommended that a pilot focuses on a nearby object that is known to be approximately one metre away.
